aggregateRating.rationale: The model root declares no own requirements, so its aggregate considers only its two children. format-spec aggregates to target; readme aggregates to minimum. The README is the binding constraint, and the model's own Risks rank an overstating README as a first-order failure ('turns newcomers away or misleads them') — exactly the show-don't-tell payoff gaps and the inaccurate command-status claim found here. Closing the README gaps would lift the whole-model rating to target.
